item.title: Version 0.2.2
item.description:
v0.2.2 — first fully-working release

  • Menubar buttons now respond to clicks. v0.2.0 and v0.2.1 had a broken responder chain caused by Sparkle's auto-check window opening at launch; this release fixes it by deferring Sparkle's startup until user-triggered check.
  • Menubar style switched from .menu to .window popover for reliable action dispatch on macOS Tahoe 26.
  • Default server port: 5055 (was 8765, which collided with the brain store http.server).
  • --port and --no-open properly passed to the Python subprocess.
  • Server-error surfacing in the menubar (subprocess stderr is now visible on failure).
  • Build pipeline hardening: build script now fails loudly on Swift compile errors instead of silently shipping the previous cached binary (this was masking ~1 hour of debugging on 2026-06-01).
  • Sparkle 2.x API: updater.start() (was incorrectly startUpdater()).

If you're on v0.2.0 or v0.2.1 and your menubar doesn't respond, redownload from the landing page.
